arts.ttl: Salah, De Bruyne, Van Dijk, Alexander-Arnold: The best rated 2025 Free Agent XI
arts.sum: The summer window is fast approaching, and there are a number of free agents on the market that could prompt a mad scramble in the off season. Here, we run through a Free Agent XI with players from L...

arts.ttl: Two Liverpool forwards in line for transfer exits this summer whatever happens to Mo Salah
arts.sum: Liverpool could wave goobye to two members of their forward line regardless of whether Mo Salah extends his contract in the coming weeks as Arne Slot prepares for a busy summer
